title: Gap 3: Ramanujan-Petersson Dependency Cleanup

dependency_map.object: Ramanujan-Petersson dependency map for T108 (Langlands Bypass)
dependency_map.T108_statement: T108 (Langlands RDL Bypass): Ramanujan bounds → spectral unitarity → ET=3 without any limit stability argument.

GL1_Dirichlet.citation: Classical: |χ(p)| = 1 for all primes p (Ramanujan trivially holds)

GL2_Maass.citation: Ramanujan-Petersson for Maass forms: OPEN (best: Kim-Sarnak θ=7/64)
GL2_Maass.depth_consequence: ET(L(f_Maass,s)) = 3: CONDITIONAL on full RP conjecture. UNCONDITIONAL for Eisenstein series (spectral unitarity from functional equation). Best unconditional: ET ≤ 3 + O(θ) where θ = 7/64 → near-EML-3.

GL3_general.citation: Ramanujan for general GL₃: OPEN (Kim-Sarnak gives 5/14)

GL3_Sym2.citation: Sym² lifts of GL₂: Ramanujan from Deligne via Sym² (T131)

Selberg_class.citation: Selberg class axiom 4: Ramanujan bound a_p = O(p^ε) is an AXIOM of S
Selberg_class.depth_consequence: ET(L) = 3 for all L ∈ S: PROVEN from axioms of S (T121)

proven_unconditional_core.applies_to: GL₁ Dirichlet, GL₂ holomorphic cusp forms, Sym^n (all n), GL₂×GL₂
proven_unconditional_core.theorem: For these L-functions: ET = 3 UNCONDITIONALLY (Deligne + functoriality).

proven_from_selberg_axioms.applies_to: All L ∈ Selberg class S (axiom system)
proven_from_selberg_axioms.theorem: If one accepts the Ramanujan axiom in S, then ET = 3 for all L ∈ S.
proven_from_selberg_axioms.status: Proven from axioms (T121); Ramanujan is an AXIOM of S, not a conjecture

conditional_remainder.best_unconditional: Kim-Sarnak: ET ≤ 3 + δ where δ → 0 as bounds improve

cleaned_bypass.T108_revised: T108 (cleaned): For all L in the Selberg class with proven Ramanujan bounds (GL₁, GL₂ holomorphic, Sym^n all n, GL₂×GL₂), the Langlands bypass gives ET = 3 UNCONDITIONALLY. The RP conjecture for Maass forms and general GL₃ are the only remaining assumptions.

analysis.verdict: GAP 3 RESOLVED: proven and conditional parts cleanly separated
analysis.theorem: T169: Cleaned Langlands Bypass — dependency-stratified T108

key_theorem: T169: Cleaned Langlands Bypass (Gap 3, S448). Dependency-stratified T108: PROVEN unconditionally: GL₁, GL₂ holomorphic (Deligne), Sym^n all n, GL₂×GL₂. PROVEN from Selberg axioms: all L ∈ S (Ramanujan is an axiom, not a conjecture). CONDITIONAL: GL₂ Maass forms (Kim-Sarnak best bound), general GL₃. GAP 3 RESOLVED: proven vs. conditional clearly separated.
rabbit_hole_log: GL₂ holomorphic cusp forms: Ramanujan = Deligne 1974 → PROVEN
Selberg class: Ramanujan is an AXIOM of S (not a conjecture within S)
GL₂ Maass: best bound θ=7/64 (Kim-Sarnak); full RP conjecture open
Sym^n lifts: Deligne → Ramanujan for all Sym^n (T134)
T169: Cleaned Langlands Bypass — dependency map complete, Gap 3 resolved
